allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total commits on GitHub: {len\(data\) if isinstance\(data,list\) else data}'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Contributors: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"login\\"]}: {c[\\"contributions\\"]}'\) for c in d[:10]]")
